column1: # Defines the SOME structure scope: the subset of species-tree structures whose
# ambiguous nodes the "some" projection should cover. Read by Script 001/002 via
# Two accepted forms (this file uses the TSV-with-header form):
#   1. TSV with a Structure_ID column (this template). Extra columns are ignored.
#   2. A bare list — one structure_id per line, no header.
# Blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored. The resolved SOME set is
# the UNION of this file and the inline structure_scopes.some.structure_ids list.
# A natural source for this file is a trees_species/BLOCK_user_requests run: its
# selected-structures output (which resolves a topological hypothesis to the
# matching structure ids) can be pointed at directly, or its ids pasted below.
# Structure ids are structure_001 .. structure_NNN (zero-padded to 3 digits).

column2: Note (optional free-text; ignored by the pipeline)
example: the input species tree's first resolution
